'''Kemmel Attapi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Silika]] who was the ruling champion of the [[Contest]], a [[Silika water]] drinking game and was undefeated until he challenged the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], [[Dannen Lifehold]].<ref name="BF" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|Breaking Free: The Adventures of Dannen Lifehold}} {{1stm}}
